title: Transaction Data
description: Query individual transactions and conversions attributed to your campaigns, with revenue and attribution details.

steps.title: Understand transaction data
steps.description:
Transaction reports track purchases and conversions attributed to your campaign orders. Each transaction includes:

- **revenue**: Transaction value
- **transactionDate**: When the conversion occurred
- **totalImpressions**: Number of ad impressions before conversion
- **attrMethod**: Attribution method (click, view, etc.)
- **attrWindow**: Attribution lookback window in days

steps.title: Query all transactions
steps.description: Fetch recent transactions with pagination. This query works with all permission levels.
steps.tip: This query retrieves the most recent transactions. Use pagination (after: endCursor) to fetch more.

steps.title: Filter by date range
steps.description: Filter transactions by date range to analyze specific time periods.
steps.tip: Use transactionDate_gte and transactionDate_lte for date filtering.

steps.title: Calculate totals
steps.description:
The response includes:

- **aggregate.count**: Total transactions matching your filter
- Sum the **revenue** field to get total attributed revenue
- **pageInfo.hasNextPage**: Whether more results exist

Paginate through all results to calculate accurate totals.
steps.tip: For large datasets, use the endCursor with the 'after' parameter to paginate.

tips: revenue is the transaction value attributed to the campaign
attrMethod shows how attribution was determined (click, view, etc.)
attrWindow indicates the attribution lookback window in days
Use transactionDate filtering to analyze specific time periods
orderId is the external order/transaction identifier
